title: Welcome to RAVEN DTU
excerpt: Learn about our new student organization at DTU focusing on Robotics, Autonomous Vehicles, and Navigation!
content:
We are excited to announce the launch of RAVEN DTU, a new student organization dedicated to advancing research and innovation in robotics, autonomous vehicles, and navigation technologies.

Our mission is to create an interdisciplinary community where students can collaborate on cutting-edge projects, participate in competitions, and develop practical skills that bridge the gap between theoretical knowledge and real-world applications.

Join us as we explore the fascinating world of autonomous systems and contribute to the future of robotics and navigation technology!
